name: Voodoo Doll
descs:
Turn Start: deal 3 fixed Envy Affinity damage to all enemies.

Inflict 1 [ResultReduction] to enemies with 33% or less HP.

Turn Start: deal 4 fixed Envy Affinity damage to all enemies.

Inflict 1 [ResultReduction] to enemies with 50% or less HP.

Turn Start: deal 5 fixed Envy Affinity damage to all enemies.

Inflict 2 [ResultReduction] to enemies with 50% or less HP.
